headline: Is EOG Resources (EOG) Fairly Priced As Analyst Optimism And Momentum Build
summary: Recent analyst activity around EOG Resources (EOG), including fresh coverage and higher targets tied to stronger commodity-price assumptions, has coincided with solid momentum in the shares and is putting upcoming financial results on many investors' radar. See our latest analysis for EOG Resources. At a share price of US$142.64, EOG has recently seen a 32.97% year to date share price return and a 23.39% total shareholder return over the past year. This suggests momentum has been building...
